<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace PhpParser\Node\Scalar; use PhpParser\Node\InterpolatedStringPart; require __DIR__ . '/../InterpolatedStringPart.php'; if (false) { /** * For classmap-authoritative support. * * @deprecated use \PhpParser\Node\InterpolatedStringPart instead. */ class EncapsedStringPart extends InterpolatedStringPart { } }
